You can only merge Systems where you are: You can only merge Systems where you are the owner.
connectToCloud: Connect System you want to merge with this one to {{productName}} or merge locally using {{vmsName}} Client.
mergeConfirmation: You are about to merge systems {{system}} and {{targetSystem}}. Settings and the name will be taken from the {{system}}.
primaryCannotMerge: System {{targetSystem}} has a newer software version that is incompatible with the current system. Update the current system to the latest build to merge it with the {{targetSystem}} System.
secondaryCannotMerge: System {{targetSystem}} has an older software version that is incompatible with the current system. Update {{targetSystem}} to the latest build to merge it with the current one.
systemUnavailable: System {{targetSystem}} is currently unreachable. Try again in a few minutes or contact
